sent_simp: 这件事的发展非常戏剧性。
sent_trad: 這件事的發展非常戲劇性。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì de fāzhǎn fēicháng xìjùxìng.
english: The way this matter unfolded was extremely dramatic.

pinyin: Tā yīn tānwū ér zāodào yánchéng.
english: He was severely punished for corruption.

sent_simp: 公园的南侧有一片花圃。
sent_trad: 公園的南側有一片花圃。
pinyin: Gōngyuán de náncè yǒu yī piàn huāpǔ.
english: There is a flower bed on the south side of the park.

sent_simp: 这封信的下款是他的名字。
sent_trad: 這封信的下款是他的名字。
pinyin: Zhè fēng xìn de xiàkuǎn shì tā de míngzi.
english: The signature on this letter is his name.
